title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain better than AI at reliably editing complex documents like Word files. The core challenge is that .docx files have internal structure and logic similar to software, making large-scale automated edits risky; AI struggles with this whereas humans can safely modify individual documents. Treating documents as software rather than simple text files is essential for trustworthy AI-assisted editing.
